title: Welcome back
subtitle: Private by design. Sign in to continue at your own pace.
signupSubtitle: Create your private space with a calm, secure start.
verifySubtitle: Enter the code we sent to keep your access secure.
forgotSubtitle: We’ll help you back in with a discreet reset code.
resetSubtitle: Choose a new password and continue at your own pace.
privacyLine: Private by design, for couples without judgment.
privacyLineSignup: A warm, discreet start for your private couple space.
backToSignInPrompt: Prefer to sign in another way?
trustLogin3: Your space stays discreet and secure.
trustRegister2: You control your pace and what you share.
trustRegister3: Calm, secure access from the first step.
support1: Reset and verification steps stay private.
support2: We only ask for what is needed to protect your account.
verifyEmailToEnablePassword: Verify your email to enable login with email and password.
tooManyResendAttempts: Too many resend attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

socialOnlyHint: This account uses social sign-in. Continue with your linked provider.
discoverFallback: Choose a sign-in method to continue.

userExists: Account already exists. Try login or reset password.
